description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker featuring a predominantly white and gray color scheme with a speckled texture on the overlays. The shoe has a classic Nike Swoosh in black on both sides, and the brand name 'NIKE' is prominently displayed on the heel tab in black. The upper is constructed from a combination of synthetic leather and textile materials, with a padded collar and tongue for comfort. The lacing system uses standard criss-cross laces in gray, and the midsole is white with a light gray rubber outsole. The overall design is sporty and modern, suitable for casual wear in urban environments.
description: A white and gray low-top Nike sneaker with black Swoosh logos, speckled overlays, and standard lacing. The shoe features a padded collar and a durable rubber sole.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rounded toe, gray laces, and padded tongue with the Nike logo.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black Swoosh, speckled gray overlays, and the layered construction of the upper.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the white heel tab with bold black 'NIKE' text and the heel's speckled texture.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the black Swoosh and the shoe's overall profile.
attribute_logo: Black Nike Swoosh on both sides, black 'NIKE' text on white heel tab, black Nike logo on tongue label
